channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 'When it comes to performance, it really is a cut above other mini PCs': You won't want to miss this Geekom A6 mini PC deal for office work and photo editing
item.description: In our tests, Geekom A6 mini desktop delivered impressive performance for everyday work, multitasking, and creative tasks, and it’s $100 off right now.

item.title: The AirPods are Tim Cook’s most underrated achievement
item.description: Apple Silicon chips. The iPhone's dominance. Apple Vision Pro. During Tim Cook's 15-year tenure as Apple CEO there were highs - and in the case of the Vision Pro, maybe a low - that helped define Apple as one of the most dominant forces in tech even without Steve Jobs. But one product doesn't get […]

item.title: NASA's Curiosity Rover found promising organic chemicals on Mars
item.description: The search for signs of life on Mars continues to yield promising data. A first-of-its-kind wet chemistry experiment, published Tuesday in Nature, confirmed the presence of essential ingredients of life preserved in ancient Martian sandstones.The molecules were found inside 3.5-billion-year-old sandstone. NASA's Curiosity rover collected the clay-filled rocks from an area called Glen Torridon, inside Mars' enormous Gale Crater. The rover's Sample Analysis at Mars (SAM) mobile instrument suite analyzed the data.The experiment was unique as the first off-Earth study to use the chemical tetrameth...

item.title: A look at Tim Cook’s 15-year legacy as CEO of Apple
item.description: Cook, who joined Apple in 1998, succeeded Steve Jobs as CEO in 2011 and went on to transform Apple into a $4 trillion powerhouse.

item.title: Tim Cook's Legacy Is Turning Apple Into a Subscription
item.description: The soon-to-exit Apple CEO went all in on services. Now, the incoming CEO, John Ternus, will need to embrace the AI era.

item.title: Celebrities will be able to find and request removal of AI deepfakes on YouTube
item.description: YouTube is expanding its AI deepfake monitoring feature to Hollywood - meaning some celebrity AI videos could soon disappear. The platform's likeness detection feature searches YouTube for AI deepfake content and flags it for public figures enrolled in the program. Public figures can use it to keep track of AI content on YouTube of themselves […]

item.title: Twelve South’s magnetic PowerBug charger is down to just $35
item.description: If you’re tired of dealing with a cluttered desk or nightstand, the Twelve South PowerBug cuts down on cables by plugging directly into the wall and handling multiple devices at once. And right now, it’s down to a new low price, starting at $35.05 ($15 off) at Amazon. All you need to do is plug […]

item.title: Adobe wants to help your brand get recognized even when search is getting replaced by AI
item.description: CX Enterprise, launched at Adobe Summit 2026, is described as a complete end-to-end agentic system to manage the customer lifecycle.

item.title: Govee’s new rechargeable table lamp is less than half the price of Hue’s
item.description: Nearly four years after Philips Hue launched its Go portable table lamp, Govee has announced its own version for less than half the price. While the Hue Go is currently listed for $175.99, the new Govee Table Lamp Classic has launched at $79.99. Assuming you're okay with never using it outside, Govee's alternative may be […]

item.title: The Mac is in good hands in Apple’s post-Cook era
item.description: The Mac reached a series of low points in the Tim Cook era: the fiasco of the butterfly keyboard, the clunky transition to USB-C, the underutilized potential of the Touch Bar, and the occasionally lackluster Intel chip performance. For a while, it seemed like Apple had shifted all of its attention, innovation, and care toward […]

item.title: Quelles sont les meilleures enceintes Bluetooth de JBL ? Le comparatif
item.description: Bienvenue sur notre sélection des meilleurs modèles d'enceintes Bluetooth de JBL, basée sur nos tests des produits audio de la marque. On vous présente ici les modèles les plus intéressants de la gamme.

item.title: La popularité des contenus québécois et francophones explose sur YouTube
item.description: Les internautes tombent sous le charme des contenus québécois et francophones sur YouTube, si bien que l’intérêt transcende les frontières, dévoilent de nouvelles données pour l’année 2025 diffusées par la plateforme.

item.title: Clarifai deletes 3 million photos that OkCupid provided to train facial recognition AI, report says
item.description: The photo deletion comes after an FTC settlement with Clarifai. The company had asked OkCupid — whose executives had invested in Clarifai — to share data in 2014, according to court documents.

item.title: A new ‘color’ Lidar breakthrough just made 'hands-off' self-driving cars a reality, experts say — Chinese tech will 'significantly enhance' spatial intelligence and reduce the need to 'guess' objects like traffic lights
item.description: A new color-capable Lidar system has been hailed as a “fundamental innovation” for self-driving car technology.

item.title: Silo's season 3 trailer takes us back to how it all began
item.description:
The relatively long wait for the third season of Silo is nearly over. Apple TV just announced the dystopian sci-fi hit returns on July 3, with episodes airing each Friday until September 4. We have long championed this show, calling it "another gem" for the platform. The streamer has dropped a short teaser for the upcoming season and it confirms rumors of an increased focus on the "before times" via a storyline that was introduced in the finale of season two. The trailer depicts scenes from both time periods, as protagonist Juliette, played by Rebecca Ferguson, speaks in voiceover.
"Before we...

item.title: L’Oppo Watch X3 arrive en France avec deux bonnes surprises au programme
item.description: Oppo a annoncé l'arrivée en France de sa nouvelle montre connectée, l'Oppo Watch X3. Contrairement au modèle déjà sorti en Chine, la montre est équipée en Europe du système Wear OS de Google.

item.title: Samsung The Terrace à -38 % : le TV extérieur parfait pour la Coupe du monde devient enfin plus accessible
item.description: Avec la Coupe du monde de football qui approche, difficile de rêver meilleur écran pour suivre les matchs en plein air que le Samsung The Terrace 2025 (TQ65LST7D). Pensé spécialement pour une installation en extérieur, ce modèle premium voit son prix fondre chez Boulanger, passant de 3 998 euros à 2 499 euros.

item.title: Wearable health tech might be Tim Cook’s greatest legacy
item.description: An apple a day keeps the doctor away. Granted, 19th-century proverb writers were talking about the fruit, but Tim Cook helped give new meaning to the adage with the release of the very first Apple Watch. In fact, I'd argue that when he hands the reins to John Ternus in September, it won't be iPhones, […]

item.title: Best Earth Day 2026 deals so far: Blueland cleaning products, Pela phone cases, electric composters
item.description: One easy thing you can do on Earth Day is switch to eco-friendly versions of items you use every day. We found 10+ sustainable swaps on sale.

item.title: NordVPN wants to end VPN rush-hour slowdowns with 100 Tbps global capacity
item.description: NordVPN says its network now has enough spare capacity to reduce bottlenecks during busy periods across 211 locations in 135+ countries.

item.title: J’ai testé l’Oppo Watch X3 et elle enterre la concurrence sur un point crucial
item.description: Nous avons testé la nouvelle Oppo Watch X3. Design en titane, écran Amoled ultra-lumineux et autonomie record : est-ce la meilleure montre sous Wear OS du moment ? C'est ce qu'on va voir dans ce test complet.

item.title: Forget about floor cleaning by grabbing the Eufy C28 robot vacuum and mop while its $270 off at Amazon
item.description: The Eufy C28 robot vacuum and mop is on sale at Amazon for $529.99, down from the standard price of $799.99. That's a 34% discount.

item.title: Oppo announces the Find X9 Ultra with a 50MP 10x optical zoom telephoto camera
item.description: Elbowing for attention alongside Vivo and Xiaomi, Oppo has finally launched its long-teased “ultra” version of its flagship smartphone. The Find X9 Ultra is another camera-first smartphone from Oppo, with an even more impressive spec sheet and a new array of accessories. We’re not even halfway through 2026 and we’ve been spoiled with choices, whether it’s the Galaxy S26 Ultra, the Xiaomi 17 Ultra (with or without Leica livery) or Vivo’s X300 Ultra. The Find X9 Pro was already a powerful, capable camera phone. So, what’s changed with the Ultra? We’ve had the base device for over a week, but we’...

item.title: Oppo’s new phone has one camera too many
item.description: Oppo's Find X9 Ultra offers something that no other new phone has for three long years: a 10x telephoto lens. In an attempt to win the photography front of the war between the various Ultra flagships, Oppo has turned to a trick last employed by Samsung's Galaxy S23 Ultra. It's a better 10x lens than […]

item.title: ‘The best I've ever tested’ — the Oppo Find X9 Ultra takes smartphone photography to new heights
item.description: The Oppo Find X9 Ultra aims to be the best camera phone ever made, and it just might have achieved that ambition.

item.title: J’ai testé le smartphone Android le plus cher du moment et il m’a conquis
item.description: Oppo sort pour la première fois chez nous son meilleur smartphone. Son Find X9 Ultra s'empare de tous les superlatifs et arrange son prix en conséquence. Vaut-il son pesant d'or ?

item.title: Kimi K2.6 runs agents for days — and exposes the limits of enterprise orchestration
item.description: Most orchestration frameworks were built for agents that run for seconds or minutes. Now that agents are running for hours — and in some cases days — those frameworks are starting to crack.Several model providers, such as Anthropic with Claude Code and OpenAI with Codex, introduced early support for long-horizon agents through multi-session tasks, subagents and background execution. However, these systems sometimes assume agents are still operating within bounded-time workflows even when they run for extended periods. Open-source model provider Moonshot AI wants to push beyond that with its ne...

item.title: Dive into the Magic: The Gathering Secrets of Strixhaven expansion with this discounted booster box
item.description: As of April 21, save 13% on a Secrets of Strixhaven booster box at Amazon.

item.title: Voici le Xpeng GX, un immense SUV 7 places qui promet 1 600 km d’autonomie et une recharge en 12 minutes
item.description: Xpeng vient d'ouvrir les précommandes de son GX, un SUV électrique ou hybride haut de gamme, affiché l'équivalent d'environ 50 000 euros. Un positionnement ambitieux pour un constructeur qui, ces derniers mois, a surtout fait ses chiffres grâce à une citadine d'entrée de gamme.

item.title: Xbox cuts Game Pass prices but new Call of Duty games will no longer hit the service on day one
item.description: Xbox is cutting the prices of both Game Pass Ultimate and PC Game Pass, effective immediately, but there’s one big caveat. First, the good news: Game Pass Ultimate now costs $23 per month, down from $30. PC Game Pass will now run you $14 a month instead of $16.50. The Xbox team noted in a blog post that prices may vary by region.That’s a smart, much-needed decision. In a memo that leaked last week, new Microsoft Gaming CEO Asha Sharma expressed concern over the high price of Game Pass, stating that it “has become too expensive for players, so we need a better value equation. Long term, we will...

item.title: LG's super-thin Wallpaper OLED TV starts at $5,500
item.description: The single most impressive piece of technology I saw at CES this year was LG’s revamped Wallpaper TV, AKA the OLED evo w6. It’s about as thin as a typical pencil, it’s completely wireless and it packs in all of LG’s latest OLED technology, giving it incredibly rich colors and anti-reflective capabilities. We ended up giving the Wallpaper set our best TV of CES 2026 award, simply because it looked so damn good. Now, we finally know how much it costs: LG announced the 77-inch evo w6 will go for $5,500, while the 83-inch model will sell for $7,500. Both sets are a $1,000 premium over the OLED ev...

item.title: Warby Parker’s new sport sunglasses won’t make you look like a bug
item.description: Warby Parker designed its performance sunglasses to hug the face and deflect glare. You might even wear them when you’re not working out. What comes to mind when you think of sports sunglasses? Maybe it’s rec spec goggles or big, mirrored cycling sunglasses. While these glasses are fine for action, they’re not exactly what you’d call stylish.

item.title: 5 ways Tim Cook remade Apple
item.description: From services to silicon to China, how Apple’s most methodical CEO reshaped the company after Steve Jobs. Tim Cook will be stepping down as chief executive of Apple and transitioning to a new role as executive chairman in September, the technology company announced Monday. The leadership change, approved unanimously by the company’s board of directors, will take place over several months, Apple says. John Ternus, currently senior vice president of hardware, will be the company’s next CEO....

item.title: The DJI Power 1000 Mini portable power station just launched. But not for U.S. shoppers.
item.description: The DJI Power 1000 Mini is the brand's latest portable power station with 1,008Wh capacity and a price of $467.

item.title: Meta Is Sued Over Scam Ads on Facebook and Instagram
item.description: A lawsuit from the Consumer Federation of America accuses Meta of misleading consumers about its efforts to combat scams advertisements on its platforms.

item.title: Un rover de la Nasa a réussi une analyse jamais tentée sur Mars et révèle plus de 20 molécules organiques !
item.description: Et si Mars avait gardé les « ingrédients » de la vie sous sa surface ? En analysant des roches très anciennes du cratère Gale, le rover Curiosity a mis au jour une étonnante diversité de molécules organiques, certaines piégées depuis plus de 3 milliards d’années. Des découvertes qui, si elles ne...

item.title: Ordering with the Starbucks ChatGPT app was a true coffee nightmare
item.description: Venti iced coffee, light skim milk. That's what I get at Starbucks. It is what I have gotten at Starbucks every time I've been to Starbucks for as long as I can remember, other than a brief love affair with the caffe misto a few years ago. In person, my brain barely needs to activate […]

item.title: Ce forfait sur le réseau d’Orange coûte moins cher que chez Sosh, et il propose 10 fois plus de data
item.description: 50 Go sur le réseau d'Orange à 6,99 euros par mois, sans engagement : YouPrice signe l'une des meilleures affaires du moment sur ce segment de prix.

item.title: Former Obdisian creative officer says not to bet on a Fallout: New Vegas remake, because Bethesda doesn't have 'the engineering know-how' to create it, and may not have the source code
item.description: Obsidian Entertainment co-founder and former creative officer Chris Avellone has said a Fallout: New Vegas remake may not be possible because Bethesda lacks the "engineering knowhow."

item.title: It’s not too late to de-risk your portfolio if you’re retired, or about to be
item.description: There are benefits to de-risking. Here’s how to do it. For investors hurtling toward retirement, sitting tight with stocks has been the path of least resistance in recent years. Stocks, especially U.S. names, have soundly outperformed bonds.However, recent events should serve as a wake-up call to take some risk off the table and give bonds a closer look. Stocks have recently encountered some volatility but they’re still near all-time highs. That provides pre-retirees and retirees with an opportune time to scale back equity exposure and plow the proceeds into safer assets like cash and high-qua...

item.title: Dyson’s newest floor scrubber is already on sale for 20 percent off
item.description: Dyson feels like it’s been on a tear as of late. The company recently introduced a handheld version of its iconic fan and a travel-friendly hair dryer, along with a mopping version of its ultra-thin PencilVac. And while none of them are currently discounted, you can save on the new Dyson Clean+Wash Hygiene wet cleaner, […]

item.title: Apple after Tim Cook — John Ternus will take the helm at a pivotal moment, with big shoes to fill and huge questions to answer
item.description: What challenges does Apple's incoming CEO face? And what will Apple do — and be — under John Ternus?

item.title: Xbox Game Pass Ultimate gets a price cut but loses new Call of Duty games
item.description: After Xbox CEO Asha Sharma admitted last week that "Game Pass has become too expensive for players," Microsoft is dropping the price of Xbox Game Pass Ultimate and PC Game Pass. Starting today, Xbox Game Pass Ultimate drops from $29.99 to $22.99 a month, and PC Game Pass moves to $13.99, down from $16.49 a […]

item.title: TAG Heuer Has Dropped New Polylight-Powered F1s
item.description: The five new Formula 1 watches are driven by light—and we have a definite favorite.

item.title: Cette « Steam Machine » espagnole grille Valve et rivalise avec la PS5 Pro
item.description: Valve fait attendre sa Steam Machine depuis six mois. Un développeur basé en Espagne a décidé de ne plus patienter, et le résultat fait mal.
